eyes_ready.title: Confirm all 12 eyes are crafted and ready for the End Portal frame

ender_chest.title: Craft an Ender Chest for portable void storage

subtitle.text: The portal was sealed by the law of the last civilization. You have broken every piece of that law.

description: Every chapter was a fragment of the old world's design.
The Wither Storm. The Scarlet King. The nine civilizations' eyes.
All of it was a lock.
You have collected twelve eyes from twelve civilizations and twelve traditions.
Each eye is an inheritance — memory, wound, cold, secrecy, faith, corruption.
You carry the entire record of what came before.
The End Portal frame has been waiting since before you arrived.
The stronghold was built by the last civilization
for the specific purpose of keeping the portal closed
until the inheritor arrived with every eye.
The law that kept it shut is shattered.
→ Craft an Ender Chest (portable vault for what you carry) [check]
